creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

I bet you didn’t know there was a rum distillery offering a free tour and tasting with a cozy craft cocktail lounge located right here in Lakeland, Florida! 😍

Lugo’s Craft Distillery 
2500 Drane Field Rd. STE 208
Lakeland, Florida 33811

I tried the Alejandro’s Secret Old Fashioned and it was a 10/10 fantastic!🥃

Tour reservations can be made online at their website www.lugoscraftspirits.com 

#thingstodoinflorida #floridahiddengems #floridabucketlist #lakelandflorida #distilleryflorida

transcription.text: Did you know there's a rum distillery in Lakeland, Florida, where you can do a free distillery tour and tasting? This is Lugo's Craft Distillery. I am not a rum lover by any means, but I was willing to see if the Lugos could change my mind, and I'm here to tell you that I think I've been converted. This is a family-owned and operated small business, and I witnessed the entire family working in the distillery. Mom and Dad Lugo were even hand labeling the bottles. The tour is about an hour long and very informative and entertaining. You'll get to taste all of their products, and I was really impressed even as someone who historically does not like rum. There's a great little retail shop where you can find all sorts of great products and a beautiful event room where the tasting is hosted, and you can even rent it out for private events. They have a cozy bar where the mixologists are creating some amazing craft cocktails, and the cocktail list is extensive and inventive. I tried an Old Fashioned made with their rum, and it tasted exactly like an Old Fashioned made with bourbon. It was fantastic. Save this post and send it to someone you would want to visit here with, and follow for more great Florida content from a local.
